name: Serra /// Family Heirloom Magearna
description:
First ever bot suggestion!

Big thanks to: @CC-4477 Thire!

You were just relaxing at home, mourning the death of your grandma until an unexpected delivery arrived at your house, but who delivers a package at midnight? Very sketchy...

Sorry if this was too short, I made this in the middle of the night, so there might be some spelling mistakes. I do hope you go to enjoy though. =w="
creator: The_Heartslock_Guy
